title: Embed Everything feature
excerpt:
is it just me or is the embed everything widget not functional? 
I cant embed any pdf or image. 
please let me know if there is any way to include an image on the dashboard. thanks

posts.author: racbat (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
is it just me or is the embed everything widget not functional?
I cant embed any pdf or image.
please let me know if there is any way to include an image on the dashboard. thanks

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: What are you trying to embed? Some sites won’t allow their links to be embedded ie I tried to embed Linkedin profiles but LI blocks that.

posts.author: racbat (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: just an image! cant seem to do anything.

posts.author: racbat (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: pdf or image either from desktop or sharepoint
